invalid_prior_attempt.reason: A broader code-review invocation produced assistant text but exited non-zero with error_max_budget_usd, so it was not used as acceptance evidence.

checked_criteria.summary: All six public exports remain available from src/workflow/development-flow-real.js; parity artifact confirms no missing or unexpected exports.

Provider C2C keeps runContextWorkPackages, verified provider profile, hard timeout, idle timeout, stream-json, partial-message, live-startup 120s override, isolated worker-worktree, and no local budget-cap checks.
Fixture setup, git baseline/diff behavior, requirement submit-plan-approve transitions, output schema/parser, review guard, and artifact shape remain preserved.
Extracted modules do not import the root entrypoint.
Root is 304 lines and extracted modules are 102, 127, 200, and 225 lines; no module exceeds 500 lines and no new large-file debt was introduced.
